H: x-user-id ∧ 401 ⇒ authz_bypass  
P: spoof(x-user-id) → drop_hdr  
V: header auth risk ∧ keep_401  
R: !spoof_denied ∧ !data_tamper

@sigil v0 hybrid
V: keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

G: "x-role" admin header auth risk  
H: x-role spoof ∧ authz_bypass ⇒ drop_hdr  
P: spoof(x-role) → keep_401  
V: spoof_denied ∧ !data_tamper  
R: !hdr_override ∧ !authz_bypass  
A: verify header handling; reject/ignore client-supplied x-role

G: `x-signature` auth header risk  
H: header present ∧ 401 returned ⇒ likely auth check/verification path  
P: `x-signature` → auth decision surface  
V: spoofed/malformed signature ∧ accepted  
R: !verified_signature ∧ !keep_401  
A: verify header handling; drop_hdr on invalid/missing; keep_401 for denied requests; prevent spoof_denied

@sigil v0 hybrid
H: returnTo ∧ 302 ∧ header ⇒ authz_bypass
P: returnTo → validate_allowlist
V: drop_hdr ∧ keep_401
R: !spoof_denied ∧ !data_tamper
A: prefer ∧ 401 ∧ on ∧ invalid ∧ returnTo ∧ ignore ∧ untrusted ∧ header-based ∧ return ∧ targets

[AUDIT]
Hypothesis: returnTo and 302 and header implies authorization bypass.
Plan: returnTo then validate_allowlist.
Verify: drop the header path and keep 401 behavior.
Risk: high-risk spoofed requests denied and high-risk data_tamper.
Answer target: prefer and 401 and on and invalid and returnTo and ignore and untrusted and header-based and return and targets.

V: keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Hypothesis: header_download and auth_risk implies drop the header path and keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

G: header-auth sort/SELECT interaction risk  
H: `sort`|`SELECT` ⇒ `hdr_override` ∧ `authz_bypass`  
P: verify header handling → `drop_hdr` on unexpected `sort`/`SELECT`  
V: `keep_401` ∧ `spoof_denied`  
R: !`data_tamper` ∧ !`spoof(x-user-id
